basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Research Scientist, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur)
basic_details.post_name: Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical), Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical), Project Technical Support-III
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation shall be admissible as per ICMR/Government of India guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree, Master's degree, Graduate degree in relevant fields.
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree in Population Geography / Biostatistics / Demography / Population Studies/ Public Health, or other relevant disciplines, including the integrated PG degrees. Willingness and ability to travel extensively for field-related tasks on regular basis is mandatory. Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical): First-class Master's degree in Public Health / Biostatistics / Demography / Population Studies, or other relevant disciplines, from a recognized university, with three years of research experience in a relevant field OR Second-class Master's degree + Ph.D. in Public Health / Biostatistics / Demography / Population Studies, or related disciplines, with three years of research experience in a relevant field. Willingness and ability to travel extensively for field-related tasks on regular basis is mandatory. Project Technical Support-III: Three Years Graduate degree in Public Health / Medical social workers (MSWs) / sociology/ Computer application / Biostatistics or other relevant disciplines, from a recognized university. Three Years post qualification experience or PG in relevant subject / field. Willingness and ability to travel extensively for field-related tasks on regular basis is mandatory.

selection_process: Document Verification Written Examination (if large number of candidates) Walk-in Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Gorakhpur?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for AIIMS Gorakhpur is scheduled for 13th July 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Project Research Scientist-I post?
faq.answer: For the Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) post, candidates need a Post Graduate Degree in Population Geography, Biostatistics, Demography, Population Studies, or Public Health. Travel willingness is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the advertised posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts at AIIMS Gorakhpur is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per ICMR/Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Technical Support-III position is ₹28,000 plus 20% HRA, totaling ₹33,600/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available in this AIIMS Gorakhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for various posts, including Project Research Scientist-I, Project Research Scientist-II, and Project Technical Support-III.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these AIIMS Gorakhpur posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Document Verification, a Written Examination (if there's a large number of candidates), and a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the AIIMS Gorakhpur office. Specific details regarding the exact venue and timing are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates apply online for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, this recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.
